name: omniroute-local-daemon
description: OmniRouteAI Local CLI Daemon — exposes AI CLI tools via HTTP on localhost:5059

scripts.build:win: npm run prebuild && pkg dist/bundle.cjs --target node18-win-x64 --output dist/OmniRouteAI-Local.exe
scripts.build:linux: npm run prebuild && pkg dist/bundle.cjs --target node18-linux-x64 --output dist/OmniRouteAI-Local
scripts.build:mac: npm run prebuild && pkg dist/bundle.cjs --target node18-macos-x64 --output dist/OmniRouteAI-Local-mac
scripts.build:all: npm run build:win && npm run build:linux && npm run build:mac
